error_signature: failed to bind host port 0.0.0.0:11434/tcp: address already in use
title: Port conflict when starting n8n with Docker
symptom: When trying to run n8n in Docker, an error occurs stating that the address is already in use. This prevents n8n from starting properly.
not_this_if: Using a different port that is not in use
root_cause: The error occurs because the specified port (11434) is already occupied by another service (ollama). Docker cannot bind the container to this port, leading to a failure in starting the n8n service.
fix_steps: Change the port mapping in the Docker run command from -p 11434:11434 to -p 5678:5678
agent_instruction: Update the Docker run command to use port 5678 instead of 11434.
